__inputs.name: DS_SUPABASE
__inputs.label: Supabase Postgres
__inputs.description: Select the PostgreSQL data source connected to your Supabase soccer analytics database.

list.name: match_id
list.label: Match
list.query: SELECT m.id AS __value, concat(ht.name, ' vs ', at.name, ' (', to_char(m.kickoff, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ')') AS __text FROM matches m JOIN teams ht ON ht.id = m.home_team_id JOIN teams at ON at.id = m.away_team_id ORDER BY m.kickoff DESC LIMIT 100;

targets.rawSql: SELECT ht.name AS home, m.home_score, m.away_score, at.name AS away FROM matches m JOIN teams ht ON ht.id = m.home_team_id JOIN teams at ON at.id = m.away_team_id WHERE m.id = '$match_id';
SELECT t.name AS team, mts.xg FROM match_team_stats mts JOIN teams t ON t.id = mts.team_id WHERE mts.match_id = '$match_id';
SELECT t.name AS team, mts.possession_pct FROM match_team_stats mts JOIN teams t ON t.id = mts.team_id WHERE mts.match_id = '$match_id';
SELECT t.name AS team, mts.shots, mts.shots_on_target FROM match_team_stats mts JOIN teams t ON t.id = mts.team_id WHERE mts.match_id = '$match_id';
SELECT t.name AS team, mts.fouls, mts.yellow_cards, mts.red_cards, mts.corners, mts.offsides FROM match_team_stats mts JOIN teams t ON t.id = mts.team_id WHERE mts.match_id = '$match_id';

SELECT me.minute, t.name AS team, p.full_name AS player, me.event_type, me.detail FROM match_events me JOIN teams t ON t.id = me.team_id LEFT JOIN players p ON p.id = me.player_id WHERE me.match_id = '$match_id' ORDER BY me.minute;

SELECT p.full_name AS player, t.name AS team, pms.minutes_played, pms.goals, pms.assists, pms.shots, pms.key_passes, pms.tackles, pms.rating FROM player_match_stats pms JOIN players p ON p.id = pms.player_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = pms.team_id WHERE pms.match_id = '$match_id' ORDER BY pms.rating DESC NULLS LAST;
